main.name: Ravi Ranjan Jha
main.description: React.js & Next.js Developer with 4+ years of experience building scalable, high-performance web applications using TypeScript and modern frontend architecture.
main.bio: Frontend developer with 4+ years of experience building scalable and high-performance applications using React.js and Next.js. I specialize in creating maintainable architectures, optimizing rendering performance, and crafting seamless user experiences using TypeScript, SSR/SSG, and modern state management. I thrive on solving complex UI problems and delivering production-ready solutions.

education.school: Bhai Parmanand Institute Of Business Studies

work.title: Senior Software Developer (React.js)
description: Contributed to the development of the Pulse Analytics Dashboard for Tata 1mg using React.js, Next.js, and TypeScript.
Designed dynamic chart configurations using Chart.js, enabling flexible X-axis plotting, multi-bar comparisons, and customizable line and bar charts.
Developed API-driven data transformation logic to dynamically render charts based on configurable datasets and user filters.
Integrated interactive visualizations including India map overlays and real-time analytics dashboards.
Optimized large dataset rendering using memoization, virtualization (react-window), and efficient state management with Redux Toolkit.
Implemented SSR and SSG in Next.js to improve performance, SEO, and initial load time.

work.title: Software Engineer (React.js)
description: Developed scalable and responsive web applications using React.js, Next.js, and TypeScript across multiple client projects.
Implemented Redux Toolkit to manage complex application state in multi-module architectures.
Built reusable and modular UI components using Tailwind CSS and Material-UI to ensure design consistency across platforms.
Optimized application performance through lazy loading, code splitting, and efficient component structuring.
Integrated RESTful APIs and handled dynamic data-driven rendering for real-time user interactions.
Collaborated closely with backend and design teams to deliver production-ready, maintainable web applications.

work.title: Full Stack Developer
description: Developed and maintained responsive web applications using React.js, Redux, and TypeScript in a functional component-based architecture.
Implemented state management with Redux Toolkit to enhance application scalability and performance.
Used Formik for form state management and integrated Yup for schema-based form validation to ensure data integrity and seamless user experience.
Integrated Tailwind UI into Next.js projects to create responsive and aesthetically pleasing designs, improving overall UI/UX.
Built and managed UI components using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Next.js, and React.js, ensuring consistency and high performance.
Worked with class-based components, utilizing Redux for efficient state management and improving web application functionality.
Integrated Ant Design UI components in class-based React components to create visually appealing, user-friendly interfaces.

projects.title: Pulse Dashboard by Tata 1mg
projects.description: Developed a healthcare analytics platform for Tata 1mg to provide real-time insights into patient and operational data. Built dynamic charts using Chart.js with configurable X-axis plotting, multi-bar and line charts, and India map integration. Optimized performance with React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, SSR, and SSG for faster load times and improved SEO.

projects.title: Teldrip
projects.description: Built a scalable sales engagement platform enabling automated multi-channel outreach via email, calls, and SMS using configurable drip campaigns. Developed intuitive campaign builders, lead management dashboards, and activity tracking systems. Improved performance and SEO using Next.js SSR/SSG, and ensured efficient state handling with Redux Toolkit. Enhanced user experience with optimized rendering, reusable components, and responsive UI design.

projects.title: Apexload (TMS)
projects.description: Apexloads is a unified logistics platform revolutionizing Africa's transportation industry by integrating multiple functionalities into a single system. It combines a load board, Transportation Management System (TMS), Customer Relationship Manager (CRM), real-time shipment visibility, and invoice factoring services.

projects.title: Water Link (Trading Platform)
projects.description: A trading platform for metal scrap and minerals/ores. It features an admin section with an enquiry module, job section, and shipping module for detailed information about products, jobs, and shipping details.

projects.title: EdMused LMS
projects.description: A comprehensive Learning Management System designed to support dynamic, customizable training solutions. The platform enables the creation of levels, activities, and sub-activities, along with the upload of video content. During video sessions, learners engage with interactive quizzes and assignments, including multiple-choice questions (MCQs), fill-in-the-blanks, and true/false formats. The system also provides an admin panel for managing content and tracking progress, while learners can complete courses, participate in activities, and earn certificates upon successful completion.

projects.title: Bluenudge LMS
projects.description: Developed interactive panels for learners, clients, and coordinators in a Learning Management System, supporting course creation, level management, and user engagement. Enhanced accessibility and user experience using React.js, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS.

projects.title: Nederland Diagnostics
projects.description: Nederland Diagnostics is a healthcare and diagnostics company focused on providing advanced, affordable diagnostic solutions in the Philippines. The company is known for its state-of-the-art laboratory facilities and efficient IT systems to ensure accurate and timely medical test results for patients and healthcare providers.

projects.title: Eonmed – Digital Healthcare Solution
projects.description: A cutting-edge platform designed to make primary healthcare affordable and accessible for all without compromising quality. Eonmed allows patients to register and log in to consult doctors directly through video calls, facilitating seamless online consultations. The platform offers features such as online fee payments, downloadable prescriptions, and medication recommendations. This system integrates Eonmed’s vision of revolutionizing healthcare by combining traditional physical experiences with modern digital solutions. Leveraging advanced technologies, the platform is supported by a team of expert doctors proficient in addressing both physical ailments and contemporary issues like mental health. Eonmed’s phygital healthcare approach ensures a comprehensive and user-friendly experience, bridging the gap between traditional and digital medical care.

projects.title: Using Python to Access Web Data

testimonials.text: Sonny is absolutely excellent, his depth of knowledge & his mentorship really meant a lot to us... I would definitely recommend
Learning with Sonny has been AWESOME, he makes learning React so easy and approachable, you'll finally feel like you know what's going on!
